about.intro: Hi, I'm Will Ziegler. I fix software for a living and break it for fun.
paragraphs: I'm a wannabe developer and I like to make things that are fun to look at. I love solving problems, figuring things out, and learning about all kinds of bullshit.
Outside of work I love games of all sorts, trivia, watching movies, and sightseeing.

projects.title: Brutalist AI Dashboard
projects.blurb: Generative banner generator that turns any seed string into a deterministic LLM-training visualization.
